hard_gates.name: permission-provenance-and-private-text
hard_gates.evidence: The completed development artifact retained source hashes and page locators; private course text remained ignored.

hard_gates.name: resource-limits
hard_gates.evidence: Clean development warm p95 was 64.82 seconds against a 5-second gate; cache size was 2.25 GiB.

hard_gates.name: one-time-heldout-completion
hard_gates.evidence: The shared held-out process ended after 29 of 59 standard cases and wrote no final artifact.

decision.rationale: Drop the current local MPS Qwen3 contextual-reranker configuration. It showed a large development quality gain but failed the frozen latency gate by about thirteen times, and the one-time held-out process did not complete. The invalid run cannot select a retriever.
limitations: All quality measurements in this record are development calibration evidence, not held-out performance.
No held-out aggregate or paired uncertainty estimate exists because the process wrote no final artifact.
Peak RSS did not capture all Apple unified GPU-memory pressure.
The exact cause of premature process termination is undetermined because stderr and a crash report were unavailable.
